# Elbek Bataa

With a sharp eye and few words, he turns mistakes into second chances.

> **Ancestry:** Drakona
> **Community:** Orderborne
> **Role:** Scout

## Features

**Prepared (2):** This card begins with **2 tokens** and cannot gain additional tokens until the next rest.

**Second Chance:** When an ally within Close range fails a roll, **spend 1 token** for _Elbek_ to allow them to reroll one of their Duality Dice.
